title: urostigma cordatum
intro: Urostigma cordatum, also known as the Cordate Urostigma, is a type of plant species within the family of ferns, specifically in the genus Urostigma. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Urostigma cordatum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Urostigma cordatum include teas and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throats.
